reference: WHEN SATURDAY CAME POLLY STARTED AS USUAL FOR A VISIT TO BECKY AND BESS BUT COULD N'T RESIST STOPPING AT THE SHAWS TO LEAVE A LITTLE PARCEL FOR FAN THOUGH IT WAS CALLING TIME
text: when saturday came polly started as usual for a visit to becky and bess but couldn't resist stopping at the shores to leave a little parcel for fan though it was calling time
